meta.homeTitle: Dr. Maksym Baida, PhD — Modern Orthopaedic Reconstruction
meta.homeDescription: Modern reconstructive orthopaedics, deformity correction and limb lengthening. Kyiv.
meta.clinicalTitle: For colleagues — Clinical & Reconstruction Ecosystem | Dr. Maksym Baida, PhD
meta.clinicalDescription: A space for physicians, the academic community and technology partners: reconstruction ecosystem, clinical cases, academic work and collaboration.

hero.subtitle: Modern reconstructive orthopaedics, deformity correction and limb lengthening.
hero.body: A specialised field of modern orthopaedics for patients with limb shortening, deformities and asymmetry, as well as for functional and aesthetic limb lengthening.

paragraphs: Modern reconstructive orthopaedics combines functional recovery, deformity correction and advanced limb-lengthening technologies.
Individualised treatment planning makes it possible to address limb shortening, asymmetry, the consequences of trauma and the aesthetic correction of body proportions.
Modern reconstructive technologies open the way to more precise, controlled and predictable restoration of limb function and anatomy.

philosophy.pre: Modern reconstruction is the union of
philosophy.author: Dr. Maksym Baida, PhD

principles.label: Precision
principles.body: Individualised planning of every reconstruction case — from axis geometry to control of limb symmetry. No off-the-shelf solutions.

principles.label: Experience
principles.body: A focused reconstructive practice, academic work and international professional exchange in modern reconstructive orthopaedics.

principles.label: Technology
principles.body: Modern reconstruction systems, correction planning and minimally invasive approaches as part of the reconstruction workflow.

about.p2: Core areas of work include treating the consequences of trauma, reconstructing complex orthopaedic defects, restoring symmetry, and modern approaches to functional and aesthetic limb restoration. Combines clinical practice, academic work and modern reconstructive technologies.

paragraphs: The advancement of modern reconstructive orthopaedics combines clinical practice, academic work and international professional exchange.

A university clinical setting provides the foundation for developing modern reconstruction approaches, professional communication and the adoption of advanced technologies in limb reconstruction and lengthening.
academic.quote: Modern reconstruction is continuous development, professional exchange and technological progress.

paragraphs: Modern reconstructive orthopaedics combines individualised planning, control of limb axis and symmetry, and advanced technologies for correction and fixation.
The advancement of reconstruction technologies opens new possibilities for more precise, controlled and functional recovery in deformities, shortening and limb lengthening.
technology.quote: Technology should not replace the surgeon, but extend the possibilities of reconstruction.

miniCards.title: Individualised planning
miniCards.body: Analysis of limb geometry and selection of a reconstruction scenario tailored to the specific case.

miniCards.title: Symmetry and axis control
miniCards.body: Restoration of the axis, symmetry and biomechanical balance of the lower limbs.

miniCards.title: Modern reconstruction systems
miniCards.body: Technological solutions for correction and fixation as part of the reconstruction workflow.

miniCards.title: Functional recovery
miniCards.body: Controlled restoration of function and anatomy in deformities and lengthening.

bookOnline.body: Send your imaging and a brief description of the situation — you will receive a preliminary treatment plan with notes on the next steps.

footer.brandDescription: Dr. Maksym Baida, PhD — modern reconstructive orthopaedics, deformity correction and limb lengthening.
footer.copyright: © 2026 Modern Orthopaedic Reconstruction. All rights reserved.

hero.subtitle: A space for physicians, the academic community and technology partners — around a modern reconstruction ecosystem.
hero.body: Limb reconstruction and lengthening, deformity correction and axis control — as shared clinical, academic and technological work, not merely an individual practice.

paragraphs: For a professional audience, the reconstruction field is not a standalone service but an end-to-end process: from planning the geometry to controlling the functional outcome.

Technological solutions and modern reconstruction systems are integrated into this process as a tool of precision surgery. Technology extends the possibilities of reconstruction — without replacing the surgeon's clinical judgement.
ecosystem.imageAlt: Knee joint geometry — reconstruction planning overlay

layers.title: Pre-operative planning
layers.body: Analysis of limb geometry, axis and symmetry; modelling of correction and the reconstruction scenario for the specific case.

layers.title: Correction and fixation systems
layers.body: Modern reconstruction systems for controlled correction, fixation and lengthening — as part of a single workflow, not an implant catalogue.

layers.title: Intra-operative control
layers.body: Control of axis, symmetry and biomechanical balance during the procedure, guided by the pre-operative plan.

layers.title: Functional recovery
layers.body: Controlled restoration of function and anatomy in deformities, shortening and lengthening, following a predictable protocol.

cases.intro: Structured clinical cases: indications, planning, technique, outcome. Full materials and images are available on request following professional approval.

activity.intro: The advancement of the reconstruction field brings together clinical practice, academic work and international professional exchange in a single environment.
activity.quote: Modern reconstruction is continuous development, professional exchange and technological progress.

tracks.title: Referring physicians
tracks.body: Referral of patients with deformities, shortening, asymmetry and the consequences of trauma. Preliminary case assessment and feedback on the reconstruction scenario.

tracks.title: Joint surgery and second opinion
tracks.body: Professional consultation in complex cases, joint procedures and an independent opinion on reconstruction and axis-correction planning.

tracks.title: MedTech / reconstruction ecosystem
tracks.body: Engagement with technology partners around modern reconstruction systems — clinical evaluation, workflow development and professional collaboration.

partnership.ctaBody: Write a brief note about the case, the format of collaboration or a request for clinical materials — you will receive a reply on the next steps.
